overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character traverses wet intersections, passes beneath elevated highways with cyan underlighting, and walks through covered walkways lined with massive digital billboards, surrounded by futuristic architecture and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the wet street with yellow striped markings
character reaches opposite sidewalk and continues walking toward the elevated highway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across a rain-slicked neon intersection, following a companion wearing a white hat and brown vest

notable_agents.action: companion in white hat walking ahead of player toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright pink and cyan neon advertisements and holographic displays
massive concrete and steel overpass structure with distinctive cyan neon underlighting spanning the street
red and purple automated vending kiosk with illuminated product display and Japanese text
yellow painted pedestrian crossing lines on wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked urban intersection at night, bathed in pink and cyan neon light from massive building-mounted advertisements. The player character follows a companion in a white hat across a yellow-striped crosswalk, heading toward an elevated highway overpass glowing with cyan underlighting in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway with cyan neon underlighting

events.description: character walks beneath the elevated highway overpass, entering a covered area with artificial cyan lighting
character transitions from walking to jogging along the sidewalk alongside moving traffic
futuristic cars and vans pass by on the right side of the walkway under the overpass

agents.ego_description: jogging under the elevated highway alongside moderate traffic, passing street vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan and van driving past on the road alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure above
small street vendor stall with metal awning and illuminated display cases
yellow and black striped bollards separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered space beneath the elevated highway, where the lighting shifts to artificial cyan neon strips lining the concrete underbelly of the overpass. Jogging alongside moderate traffic, the character passes between massive support pillars and yellow traffic barriers, with the wet road reflecting the cyan lights above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street lined with palm trees and distant skyscrapers

events.description: character exits the covered overpass area back into open street with visible sky and palm trees
lighting shifts from artificial cyan underpass lights to open night sky with ambient city glow

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with palm trees lining the right side, city skyline visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the street against the night sky
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and corporate signage
tall modern lampposts with multiple floodlights illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees lining the street and a distant futuristic skyline glowing against the night sky. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk past modern street lamps, with the lighting transitioning from artificial cyan to natural night ambiance mixed with distant city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with massive curved digital advertisement screens

events.description: character enters a covered walkway with large curved digital billboards displaying animated advertisements on the left wall
character slows to a steady walking pace while passing other pedestrians in the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered arcade-like walkway, passing large illuminated advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket with white hair walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: concrete ceiling structure with integrated linear neon strip lighting in cyan and white
massive curved digital screen wall displaying animated advertisements including 'CHROMATIC' and 'MILFGUARD' in bright colors
orange metal safety railing separating the walkway from the lower road level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway where the left wall is dominated by massive curved digital screens displaying vibrant animated advertisements. Walking under the concrete ceiling with integrated neon strips, the character passes orange safety railings and other pedestrians while moving deeper into the covered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban district that transitions from an open rain-slicked intersection into a series of enclosed futuristic corridors. It begins at a vibrant crosswalk bathed in pink and cyan light, following a character in a white hat toward the glowing underbelly of an elevated highway. As the camera enters the underpass, the environment shifts to a tunnel of artificial cyan neon strips and concrete pillars reflecting off the wet road amidst moderate traffic. The scene then opens up into a night-air vista featuring palm trees and a distant glowing skyline before turning back into a covered pedestrian walkway. Finally, the lighting transforms again as the camera moves deeper into this corridor, flanked by massive curved digital screens and orange safety railings under a concrete ceiling.
